LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT KURT S. ADLER, INC., THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT. JUDGE; HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Continued To Aug-22-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Kurt S. Adler, Inc.
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Peter Englander's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Kurt S. Adler, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Moving party to submit form of order and judgment. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
